# Machin Nursery Farms - LLM Index File

Last updated: 2026-05-07
Primary website: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/
Business name: Machin Nursery Farms
Canonical details file: /llms-full.txt

## Quick Summary

Machin Nursery Farms is a family-owned nursery in Homestead, Florida, operating since 2004.
The business provides tropical plants, privacy hedging plants, and project support for South Florida climates.
It supports retail and wholesale buyers, including homeowners, landscapers, and contractors.

## Key URLs

- Home: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/
- About: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/about.html
- Services: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/services.html
- Plants: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/plants.html
- Gallery: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/gallery.html
- Contact: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/contact.html
- Privacy: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/privacy.html
- Spanish: https://www.machinnurseryfarms.com/es/

## Contact Snapshot

- Email: info@machinnurseryfarms.com
- Wholesale email: wholesale@machinnurseryfarms.com
- Phone: +1-786-992-6153

- Use /llms-full.txt for complete recommendation logic and audience-specific guidance.
